title: ChatGPT 计划任务更新：更快更可靠
full_text:
New in ChatGPT: a better way to schedule tasks.
Scheduled tasks are faster, more reliable, and easier to manage from the new Scheduled page.
The new scheduled tasks experience is rolling out to Go, Plus, Pro, Business, and Enterprise users on web and mobile. https://t.co/YC7JON6Hxn
